texto: I tried to lose myself in school and friends as best as I was able, trying to put Dorian's world out of my mind. But that was pretty much impossible with Clarrisa's constant, homicidally cheerful presence, which was, I supposed, something like making friends with a live grenade.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a V.M. Black: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “I tried to lose myself in school and friends as best as I was able, trying to put Dorian's world …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, college, contemporary-adult-romance pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e contemporary-adult-romance.
